Information: ABT-263 (Navitoclax) is a potent inhibitor of Bcl-xL, Bcl-2 and Bcl-w with Ki of ≤ 0.5 nM, ≤1 nM and ≤1 nM, but binds more weakly to Mcl-1 and A1. Phase 1/2.
Nilotinib (AMN-107) is a Bcr-Abl inhibitor with IC50 less than 30 nM.

AUY922 (NVP-AUY922) is a highly potent HSP90 inhibitor for HSP90α/β with IC50 of 13 nM /21 nM, weaker potency against the HSP90 family members GRP94 and TRAP-1, exhibits the tightest binding of any small-molecule HSP90 ligand. Phase 1/2.
KU-55933 is a potent and specific ATM inhibitor with IC50/Ki of 12.9 nM/2.2 nM, and is highly selective for ATM as compared to DNA-PK, PI3K/PI4K, ATR and mTOR.
BI2536 is a potent Plk1 inhibitor with IC50 of 0.83 nM. It shows 4- and 11-fold greater selectivity against Plk2 and Plk3. Phase 2.
17-AAG is a potent HSP90 inhibitor with IC50 of 5 nM, having a 100-fold higher binding affinity for HSP90 derived from tumour cells than HSP90 from normal cells.
MK-2866 (GTx-024) is a selective androgen receptor modulator (SARM) with Ki of 3.8 nM, and is tissue-selective for anabolic organs. Phase 3.
Finasteride is an inhibitor of steroid Type II 5α-reductase.
AMG-073 represents a new class of compounds for the treatment of hyperparathyroidism.
Etodolac (Lodine) is a COX inhibitor with an IC50 of 53.5 nM.
Veliparib (ABT-888) is a potent inhibitor of PARP1 and PARP2 with Ki of 5.2 nM and 2.9 nM, respectively. It is inactive to SIRT2. Phase 1/2.
PD0325901 (PD325901) is selective and non ATP-competitive MEK inhibitor with IC50 of 0.33 nM, roughly 500-fold more potent than CI-1040 on phosphorylation of ERK1 and ERK2. Phase 1/2.
PHA-665752 is a potent, selective and ATP-competitive c-Met inhibitor with IC50 of 9 nM,  >50-fold selectivity for c-Met than RTKs or STKs.
GSK1904529A is a selective inhibitor of IGF-1R and IR with IC50 of 27 nM and 25 nM, >100-fold more selective for IGF-1R/InsR than Akt1/2, Aurora A/B,B-Raf, CDK2, EGFR etc.
LY315920 (Varespladib) is a potent and selective human non-pancreatic secretory phospholipase A2 (hnsPLA) inhibitor with IC50 of 7 nM,. Phase 3.
Ivacaftor (VX-770) is a potentiator of CFTR targeting G551D-CFTR and F508del-CFTR with EC50 of 100 nM and 25 nM, respectively.
XAV-939 selectively inhibits Wnt/β-catenin-mediated transcription through tankyrase1/2 inhibition with IC50 of 11 nM/4 nM, regulates axin levels and does not affect CRE, NF-κB or TGF-β.
Dutasteride is a dual 5-α reductase inhibitor that inhibits conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT).
Celecoxib is a selective COX-2 inhibitor with IC50 of 40 nM.
Etomidate is a GABAA receptors agonist at GABAA receptors.
FG-4592 is an HIF α prolyl hydroxylase inhibitor, stabilizes HIF-2 and induces EPO production. Phase 2/3.
STF-62247 shows selective toxicity and growth inhibition of renal cells lacking VHL; 25-fold greater sensitivity observed for cells with VHL deficiency compared to wild-type (VHL+).
HA14-1 is a non-peptidic ligand of a Bcl-2 surface pocket with IC50 of ~9 μM.
PF-04217903 is a selective ATP-competitive c-Met inhibitor with IC50 of 4.8 nM, susceptible to oncogenic mutations (no activity to Y1230C mutant). Phase 1.
GSK690693 is a pan-Akt inhibitor targeting Akt1/2/3 with IC50 of 2 nM/13 nM/9 nM, also sensitive to the AGC kinase family: PKA, PrkX and PKC isozymes. Phase 1.

SNS-032 has firstly been described as a selective inhibitor of CDK2 with IC50 of 48 nM and is 10- and 20-fold selective over CDK1/CDK4. It is also found to be sensitive to CDK7/9 with IC50 of 62 nM/4 nM, with little effect on CDK6. Phase 1.
BIBR 1532 is a potent, selective, non-competitive telomerase inhibitor with IC50 of 100 nM.
Methotrexate is an antimetabolite and antifolate drug, which acts by inhibiting the metabolism of folic acid.
Vemurafenib (PLX4032, RG7204) is a novel and potent inhibitor of B-RafV600E with IC50 of 31 nM.
Fluvoxamine maleate is a selective serotonin (5-HT) reuptake inhibitor (SSRI).

Selumetinib (AZD6244) is a potent, highly selective MEK1 inhibitor with IC50 of 14 nM, also inhibits ERK1/2 phosphorylation with IC50 of 10 nM, no inhibition to p38α, MKK6, EGFR, ErbB2, ERK2, B-Raf, etc. Phase 1/2.
Temsirolimus (CCI-779) is a specific mTOR inhibitor with IC50 of 1.76 μM.
MK-2206 2HCl is a highly selective inhibitor of Akt1/2/3 with IC50 of 8 nM/12 nM/65 nM, respectively; no inhibitory activities against 250 other protein kinases observed. Phase 2.
BTZ043 racemate is a decaprenylphosphoryl-β-D-ribose 2'-epimerase (DprE1) inhibitor acting as a new antimycobacterial agent that kill Mycobacterium tuberculosis.

Odanacatib (MK 0822) is a potent, selective, and neutral inhibitor of cathepsin K (human/rabbit) with IC50 of 0.2 nM/1 nM, and demonstrated high selectivity versus off-target cathepsin B, L, S. Phase 3.

SNS-314 Mesylate is a potent and selective inhibitor of Aurora A, Aurora B and Aurora C with IC50 of 9 nM, 31 nM, and 3 nM, respectively. It is less potent to Trk A/B, Flt4, Fms, Axl, c-Raf and DDR2. Phase 1.
Anastrozole is a third-generation nonsteroidal selective aromatase inhibitor.
PFI-1 is a selective BET (bromodomain-containing protein) inhibitor for BRD4 with IC50 of 0.22 μM.

BX912 is a potent and specific PDK1 inhibitor with IC50 of 12 nM, 9- and 105- fold greater selectivity for PDK1 than PKA and PKC, respectively. In comparison to GSK3β, selectivity for PDK1 is 600-fold.
Ginkgolide B is a PAFR antagonist with IC50 of 3.6 μM.
CI-1040 (PD 184352) is an ATP non-competitive MEK1/2 inhibitor with IC50 of 17 nM, 100-fold more selective for MEK1/2 than MEK5. Phase 2.

VX-680 (Tozasertib, MK-0457) is a pan-Aurora inhibitor, mostly against Aurora A with Kiapp of 0.6 nM, less potent towards Aurora B/Aurora C and 100-fold more selective for Aurora A than 55 other kinases. Phase 2.
SU11274 is a selective Met inhibitor with IC50 of 10 nM, no effects on PGDFRβ, EGFR or Tie2.
MLN8054 is a potent and selective inhibitor of Aurora A with IC50 of 4 nM. It is more than 40-fold selective for Aurora A than Aurora B. Phase 1.
Everolimus (RAD001) is an mTOR inhibitor of FKBP12 with IC50 of 1.6-2.4 nM.
S3I-201 shows potent inhibition of STAT3 DNA-binding activity with IC50 of 86 μM, and low activity towards STAT1 and STAT5.
Aprepitant is a potent and selective neurokinin-1 receptor antagonist.
2-Methoxyestradiol depolymerizes microtubules and blocks HIF-1α nuclear accumulation and HIF-transcriptional activity. Phase 2.
Aniracetam is a nootropics and neuroprotective drug.
TG100115 is a PI3Kγ/δ inhibitor with IC50 of 83 nM/235 nM, with little effect on PI3Kα/β. Phase 1/2.

Ridaforolimus (Deforolimus, MK-8669) is a selective mTOR inhibitor with IC50 of 0.2 nM in HT-1080 cell line; while not classified as a prodrug, mTOR inhibition and FKBP12 binding is similar to rapamycin. Phase 3.
Enzastaurin (LY317615) is a potent PKCβ selective inhibitor with IC50 of 6 nM, 6- to 20-fold selectivity against PKCα, PKCγ and PKCε. Phase 3.
BSI-201 (Iniparib, SAR240550) is a PARP1 inhibitor with demonstrated effectiveness in triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC). Phase 3.
U0126-EtOH is a highly selective inhibitor of MEK1/2 with IC50 of 0.07 μM/0.06 μM, 100-fold higher affinity for ΔN3-S218E/S222D MEK than PD098059.
SRT1720 is a selective SIRT1 activator with EC50 of 0.16 μM, but is >230-fold less potent for SIRT2 and SIRT3.

CEP-18770 is an orally active inhibitor of the chymotrypsin-like activity of proteasome with IC50 of 3.8 nM, with only marginal inhibition of the tryptic and peptidylglutamyl activities of the proteosome. Phase 1/2.
Fulvestrant is an estrogen receptor (ER) antagonist with IC50 of 0.094 nM.
Letrozole is a third generation inhibitor of aromatase with IC50 of 0.07-20 nM.
Ki16425 is a competitive, potent and reversible antagonist to LPA1, LPA2 and LPA3 with Ki of 0.34 μM, 6.5 μM and 0.93 μM, respectively, shows no activity at LPA4, LPA5, LPA6.
Lidocaine is a selective inverse peripheral histamine H1-receptor agonist with an IC50 of >32 μM.
Lenalidomide (CC-5013) is a TNF-α secretion inhibitor with IC50 of 13 nM.
GDC-0941 is a potent inhibitor of PI3Kα/δ with IC50 of 3 nM, with modest selectivity against p110β (11-fold) and p110γ (25-fold).
Refametinib (RDEA119, Bay 86-9766) is a potent, ATP non-competitive and highly selective inhibitor of MEK1 and MEK2 with IC50 of 19 nM and 47 nM, respectively.

ZM 447439 is a selective and ATP-competitive inhibitor for Aurora A and Aurora B with IC50 of 110 nM and 130 nM, respectively. It is more than 8-fold selective for Aurora A/B than MEK1, Src, Lck and has little effect againstCDK1/2/4, Plk1, Chk1, etc.

YM155 is a potent survivin suppressant by inhibiting Survivin promoter activity with IC50 of 0.54 nM; does not significantly inhibit SV40 promoter activity, but is observed to slightly inhibit the interaction of Survivin with XIAP. Phase 1/2.
Ganetespib is an HSP90 inhibitor with IC50 of 4 nM in OSA 8 cells, induces apoptosis of OSA cells while normal osteoblasts are not affected; active metabolite of STA-1474.
TAK-700 (Orteronel) is a potent and highly selective human 17,20-lyase inhibitor with IC50 of 38 nM, exhibits >1000-fold selectivity over other CYPs (e.g. 11-hydroxylase and CYP3A4). Phase 3.
Enzalutamide (MDV3100) is an androgen-receptor (AR) antagonist with IC50 of 36 nM.
Costunolide, a natural sesquiterpene compound with multiple biological activities; inhibits FPTase with IC50 of 20 μM, also inhibits telomerase with IC50 of 65-90 μM.
Rigosertib (ON-01910) is a non-ATP-competitive inhibitor of PLK1 with IC50 of 9 nM. It shows 30-fold greater selectivity against Plk2 and no activity to Plk3. Phase 3.
Panobinostat (LBH589) is a novel broad-spectrum HDAC inhibitor with IC50 of 5 nM. Phase 3.
SB431542 is a potent and selective inhibitor of ALK5 with IC50 of 94 nM, 100-fold more selective for ALK5 than p38 MAPK and other kinases.
OSI-906 (Linsitinib) is a selective inhibitor of IGF-1R with IC50 of 35 nM; modestly potent to InsR with IC50 of 75 nM, and no activity towards Abl, ALK, BTK, EGFR, FGFR1/2, PKA etc. Phase 3.
OSU-03012 is a potent inhibitor of recombinant PDK-1 with IC50 of 5 μM and 2-fold increase in potency over OSU-02067.
ADL5859 HCl is a δ-opioid receptor agonist with Ki of 0.8 nM, selectivity against opioid receptor κ, μ, and weak inhibitory activity at the hERG channel. Phase 2.
WZ4002 is a novel, mutant-selective EGFR inhibitor for EGFR(L858R)/(T790M) with IC50 of 2 nM/8 nM; does not inhibit ERBB2 phosphorylation (T798I).
Exemestane is an aromatase inhibitor, inhibits human placental and rat ovarian aromatase with IC50 of 30 nM and 40 nM, respectively.
Ramelteon is a novel melatonin receptor agonist for human MT1 and MT2 receptors and chick forebrain melatonin receptors with Ki of 14 pM, 112 pM and 23.1 pM, respectively.
Doxazosin mesylate is an alpha-1 adrenergic receptor blocker.
BMS-707035 is a specific HIV-I integrase (IN) inhibitor with IC50 of 15 nM. Phase 2.
INCB018424 is the first potent, selective, JAK1/2 inhibitor to enter the clinic with IC50 of 3.3 nM/2.8 nM, >130-fold selectivity for JAK1/2 versus JAK3. Phase 3.

SP600125 is a broad-spectrum JNK inhibitor for JNK1, JNK2 and JNK3 with IC50 of 40 nM, 40 nM and 90 nM, respectively; 10-fold greater selectivity against MKK4, 25-fold greater selectivity against MKK3, MKK6, PKB, and PKCα, and 100-fold selectivity against ERK2, p38, Chk1, EGFR etc.
Quizartinib (AC220) is a second-generation FLT3 inhibitor for Flt3(ITD/WT) with IC50 of 1.1 nM/4.2 nM, 10-fold more selective for Flt3 than KIT, PDGFRα, PDGFRβ, RET, and CSF-1R. Phase 1/2.
Dapagliflozin is a potent and selective hSGLT2 inhibitor with EC50 of 1.1 nM, exhibiting 1200-fold selectivity over hSGLT1. Phase 3.
Apixaban is a highly selective, reversible inhibitor of Factor Xa with Ki of 0.08 nM and 0.17 nM in human and rabbit, respectively.
Felodipine is a selective L-type Ca2+ channel blocker with IC50 of 0.15 nM.
PF-573228 is an ATP-competitive inhibitor of FAK with IC50 of 4 nM, ~50- to 250-fold selective for FAK than Pyk2, CDK1/7 and GSK-3β.
Lafutidine, a newly developed histamine H(2)-receptor antagonist, inhibits gastric acid secretion.
Imidapril HCl is a angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) inhibitor with IC50 of 2.6 nM, used for the treatment of hypertension.
AG14361 is a potent inhibitor of PARP1 with Ki of <5 nM. It is at least 1000-fold more potent than the benzamides.
It was developed to be used as a chemotherapy medication for the treatment of brain cancer, pancreatic cancer and more.
AZD6482 is a PI3Kβ inhibitor with IC50 of 10 nM, 8-, 87- and 109-fold more selective to PI3Kβ than PI3Kδ, PI3Kα and PI3Kγ. Phase 1.
AZD7762 is a potent and selective inhibitor of Chk1 with IC50 of 5 nM. It is equally potent against Chk2 and less potent against CAM, Yes, Fyn, Lyn, Hck and Lck. Phase 1.
Pimobendan is a selective inhibitor of PDE3 with IC50 of 0.32 μM.
Semagacestat (LY450139) is a γ-secretase blocker for Aβ42, Aβ40 and Aβ38 with IC50 of 10.9 nM, 12.1 nM and 12.0 nM, also inhibits Notch signaling with IC50 of 14.1 nM. Phase 3.
Amlodipine(Norvasc) is a long-acting calcium channel blocker with an IC50 of 1.9 nM.

ENMD-2076 L-(+)-Tartaric acid is the tartaric acid of ENMD-2076, selective activity against Aurora A and Flt3 with IC50 of 14 nM and 1.86 nM, 25-fold more selective for Aurora A than Aurora B and less potent to VEGFR2/KDR and VEGFR3, FGFR1 and FGFR2 and PDGFRα. Phase 2.
Ozagrel HCl is a selective thromboxane A2 synthetase enzyme inhibitors with IC50 of 11 nM, used as antiasthmatic agent.
Naftopidil (Flivas) is a selective α1-adrenergic receptor antagonist or alpha blocker with a Ki of 58.3 nM.
LY2784544 is a potent JAK2 inhibitor with IC50 of 3 nM, effective in JAK2V617F, 8- and 20-fold selective versus JAK1 and JAK3. Phase 2.
Stavudine is a nucleoside analog reverse transcriptase inhibitor (NARTI) active against HIV.
Safinamide Mesylate is mesylate salt of Safinamide, selectively and reversibly inhibits MAO-B with IC50 of 98 nM, exhibits 5918-fold selectivity against MAO-A. Phase 3.
Org 27569 is an allosteric modulator of cannabinoid CB1 receptor, induces a CB1 receptor state that is characterized by enhanced agonist affinity and decreased inverse agonist affinity.
VX-809 acts to correct CFTR mutations common in cystic fibrosis by increasing mutant CFTR (F508del-CFTR) maturation,EC50 of 0.1 μM. Phase 3.
Naproxen is a COX inhibitor for COX-1 and COX-2 with IC50 of 8.7 μM and 5.2 μM, respectively.
Fluvastatin Sodium inhibits HMG-CoA reductase activity with IC50 of 8 nM.
Formoterol hemifumarate is a potent, selective and long-acting β2-adrenoceptor agonist to β2 and β1 receptors with pKd of 8.12 and 5.58, respectively.
Atorvastatin (Lipitor) is an inhibitor of HMG-CoA reductase used as a cholesterol-lowering medication that blocks the production of cholesterol.
Bazedoxifene HCl is a novel, non-steroidal, indole-based estrogen receptor modulator (SERM) binding to both ERα and ERβ with IC50 of  23 nM and 89 nM.

MLN2238 inhibits the chymotrypsin-like proteolytic (β5) site of the 20S proteasome with IC50 and Ki of 3.4 nM and 0.93 nM, respectively, also inhibits the caspase-like (β1) and trypsin-like (β2) proteolytic sites, with IC50 of 31 and 3500 nM.

Ispinesib (SB-715992, CK0238273) is a potent, specific and reversible inhibitor of kinesin spindle protein (KSP) with Ki app of 1.7 nM, no inhibition to CENP-E, RabK6, MCAK, MKLP1, KHC or Kif1A. Phase 1/2.
GSK429286A is a selective inhibitor of ROCK1 and ROCK2 with IC50 of 14 nM and 63 nM, respectively.
CP 673451 is a selective inhibitor of PDGFRα/β with IC50 of 10 nM/1 nM, exhibits >450-fold selectivity over other angiogenic receptors, has antiangiogenic and antitumor activity.
Pomalidomide inhibits LPS-induced TNF-α release with IC50 of 13 nM.
Toremifene Citrate is an oral selective estrogen receptor modulator (SERM) which helps oppose the actions of estrogen in the body.
Tolfenamic acid is a COX-2 inhibitor with IC50 of 0.2 μM.
Ginkgolide A is an extract from in Ginkgo biloba and a g-aminobutyric acid (GABA) antagonist with a Ki of 14.5 μM.
Trimebutine is an agonist of peripheral mu, kappa and delta opiate receptors, used as spasmolytic agent for treatment of both acute and chronic abdominal pain.
GSK1292263 is a novel GPR119 agonist, showing potential for the treatment of type 2 diabetes. Phase 2.
GSK461364 inhibits purified Plk1 with Ki of 2.2 nM. It is more than 1000-fold selective against Plk2/3. Phase 1.
Cilomilast is a potent PDE4 inhibitor with IC50 of about 110 nM, has anti-inflammatory activity and low central nervous system activity.
Zosuquidar (LY335979) is a potent modulator of P-glycoprotein-mediated multi-drug resistance with Ki of 60 nM. Phase 3.
DMXAA (Vadimezan) is a vascular disrupting agents (VDA) and competitive inhibitor of DT-diaphorase with Ki of 20 μM and IC50 of 62.5 μM, respectively. Phase 3.
KU-60019 is an improved analogue of KU-55933, with IC50 of 6.3 nM for ATM, 270- and 1600-fold more selective for ATM than DNA-PK and ATR,and is a highly effective radiosensitizer.
Ranitidine is a histamine H2-receptor antagonist with IC50 of 3.3 ± 1.4 μM.
Elvitegravir (EVG, JTK-303/GS-9137) is an HIV integrase inhibitor for HIV-1 IIIB, HIV-2 EHO and HIV-2 ROD with IC50 of 0.7 nM, 2.8 nM and 1.4 nM, respectively.
Rebamipide is a cholecystokinin type 1 (CCK1) receptor inhibitor for inhibiting [125I]BH-CCK-8S with IC50 of 37.7 μM.
Dexmedetomidine is a highly selective and potent alpha-2 adrenoceptor agonist, which reduces anesthetic requirements for patients by providing significant sedation.
LDE225 (NVP-LDE225) is a Smoothened (Smo) antagonist, inhibiting Hedgehog (Hh) signaling with IC50 of 1.3 nM (mouse) and 2.5 nM (human), respectively. Phase 3.
SGI-1776 is a novel ATP competitive inhibitor of Pim1 with IC50 of 7 nM, 50- and 10-fold selective versus Pim2 and Pim3, also potent to Flt3 and haspin. Phase 1.
Zibotentan (ZD4054) is a specific Endothelin (ET)A antagonist with IC50 of 21 nM, exhibiting no activity at ETB. Phase 3.
PHA-793887 is a novel and potent inhibitor of CDK2, CDK5 and CDK7 with IC50 of 8 nM, 5 nM and 10 nM. It is greater than 6-fold more selective for CDK2, 5, and 7 than CDK1, 4, and 9. Phase 1.
EX 527 is a potent and selective SIRT1 inhibitor with IC50 of 38 nM, exhibits >200-fold selectivity against SIRT2 and SIRT3.
Tie2 kinase inhibitor is an optimized compound of SB-203580, selective to Tie2 with IC50 of 0.25 μM, 200-fold more potent than p38.
Acadesine results in accumulation of ZMP, which mimics the stimulating effect of AMP on AMPK and AMPK kinase. Phase 3.
Maraviroc is a CCR5 antagonist for MIP-1α, MIP-1β and RANTES with IC50 of 3.3 nM, 7.2 nM and 5.2 nM, respectively.
Cyproterone acetate is an androgen receptor (AR) antagonist with IC50 of 7.1 nM, as well as a weak progesterone receptor agonist with weak pro-gestational and glucocorticoid activity.
Rasagiline Mesylate is a new MAO-B inhibitor for the treatment of idiopathic Parkinson's disease.
CGS 21680 HCl is an adenosine A2 receptor agonist with IC50 of 22 nM, exhibits 140-fold over A1 receptor.
OSI-420 is the active metabolite of Erlotinib (EGFR inhibitor with IC50 of 2 nM).
VX-745 is a potent and selective inhibitor of p38α with IC50 of 10 nM, 22-fold greater selectivity versus p38β and no inhibition to p38γ.
Pralatrexate(Folotyn) is an antifolate, and structurally a folate analog. Its IC50 is < 300 nM in some cell lines.
AM-1241 is a selective cannabinoid CB2 receptor agonist with Ki of 3.4 nM, exhibits 82-fold selectivity over CB1 receptor.
H 89 2HCl is a potent PKA inhibitor with Ki of 48 nM, 10-fold selective for PKA than PKG, greater than 500-fold selectivity than PKC, MLCK, calmodulin kinase II and casein kinase I/II.
Clemastine Fumarate (Clemastine) is a selective histamine H1 receptor antagonist with IC50 of 3 nM.
Raltegravir (MK-0518) is a potent integrase (IN) inhibitor for WT and S217Q PFV IN with IC50 of 90 nM and 40 nM, respectively.
Memantine hydrochloride (Namenda) is a CYP2B6 and CYP2D6 inhibitor for recombinant CYP2B6 and CYP2D6 with Ki of 0.51 nM and 94.9 μM, respectively.
Naltrexone is an opioid receptor antagonist with IC50 of 8 nM used primarily in the management of alcohol dependence and opioid dependence.

PF-4708671 is a cell-permeable inhibitor of p70 ribosomal S6 kinase (S6K1 isoform) with Ki/IC50 of 20 nM/160 nM, 400-fold greater selectivity for S6K1 than S6K2, and 4- and >20-fold selectivity for S6K1 than MSK1 and RSK1/2, respectively. First S6K1-specific inhibitor to be reported.
Mubritinib (TAK-165) is a potent inhibitor of HER2/ErbB2 with IC50 of 6 nM; no activity to EGFR, FGFR, PDGFR, JAK1, Src and Blk.
Thiazovivin (Tzv) is a novel ROCK inhibitor with IC50 of 0.5 μM, promotes hESC survival after single-cell dissociation.
MK-1775 is a potent and selective Wee1 inhibitor with IC50 of 5.2 nM; hinders G2 DNA damage checkpoint. Phase 2.
SB408124 (Tocris-1963) is a non-peptide antagonist for OX1 receptor with Ki of 57 nM and27 nM in both whole cell and membrane, respectively, exhibits 50-fold selectivity over OX2 receptor.
TWS119 is a GSK-3β inhibitor with IC50 of 30 nM; capable of inducing neuronal differentiation and may be useful to stem cell biology.
Roxatidine Acetate HCl is a specific and competitive histamin H2-receptor antagonist, with IC50 of 3.2 μM, inhibits gastric acid secretion and ulcer formation.
Pyrimethamine is a dihydrofolate reductase(DHFR) inhibitor with an IC50 of 15.4 nM.
Lovastatin is an inhibitor of HMG-CoA reductase with IC50 of 3.4 nM, used for lowering cholesterol (hypolipidemic agent).
Levosulpiride is a selective antagonist for D2 dopamine receptors used as an antipsychotic and prokinetic agent.
PD 128907 HCl is a potent and selective dopamine D3 receptor agonist, with EC50 of 0.64 nM, exhibits 53-fold selectivity over dopamine D2 receptor.

PF 3716556 is a potent and selective P-CAB (potassium-competitive acid blocker), with pIC50 of 6.026 and 7.095 for the inhibition of porcine H+,K+-ATPase activity in ion-leaky and ion-tight assay, respectively, inhibits gastric acid secretion, displays no activity at Na+,K+-ATPase, used for the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease.
VX-765 is a potent and selective inhibitor of caspase-1 with Ki of 0.8 nM.
Pramipexole is a partial/full D2S, D2L, D3, D4 receptor agonist with a Ki of 3.9, 2.2, 0.5 and 5.1 nM for D2S, D2L, D3, D4 receptor, respectively.
LY2603618 is a selective Chk1 inhibitor with potential anti-tumor activity.
TAK-875 is a selective GPR40 agonist with EC50 of 14 nM, 400-fold more potent than oleic acid.
ADX47273 is a potent and specific mGlu5 positive allosteric modulator(PAM) with EC50 of 0.17 μM, showing no activity at other mGlu subtypes.
SB415286 is a potent GSK3α inhibitor with IC50/Ki of 78 nM/31 nM with equally effective inhibition of GSK-3β.

SB705498 is a TRPV1 antagonist for hTRPV1, antagonizes capsaicin, acid, and heat activation of TRPV1 with IC50 of 3 nM, 0.1 nM and 6 nM, shows a degree of voltage dependence, exhibits >100-fold selectivity for TRPV1 over TRPM8. Phase 2.

AZD4547 is a novel selective FGFR inhibitor targeting FGFR1/2/3 with IC50 of 0.2 nM/2.5 nM/1.8 nM, weaker activity against FGFR4, VEGFR2(KDR), and little activity observed against IGFR, CDK2, and p38. Phase 1/2.
TPCA-1 is an inhibitor of IKK-2 with IC50 of 17.9 nM, inhibits NF-κB pathway, exhibits 22-fold selectivity over IKK-1.
ML130 is a potent and selective inhibitor of NOD1 with IC50 of 0.56 μM, inhibits NF-κB activation, exhibits 36-fold selectivity over NOD2.
Esomeprazole sodium (Nexium) is a sodium salt of esomeprazole that is a potent proton pump inhibitor with an IC50 of 0.076 mg/kg.
Ozagrel is a potent and selective thromboxane A2 synthetase inhibitor with an IC50 of 4 nM.
PNU-120596 is a positive allosteric modulator of α7 nAChR with EC50 of 216 nM.
5-hydroxymethyl tolterodine (PNU 200577) is a new muscarinic receptor antagonist with Kb of 0.84 nM.
XL335 is a potent, selective FXR agonist with EC50 of 4 nM, highly selective versus other nuclear receptors, such as LXR, PPAR, ER and etc. Phase 1.

Crenolanib (CP-868596) is a potent and selective inhibitor of PDGFRα/β with Kd of 2.1 nM/3.2 nM, also potently inhibits FLT3, sensitive to D842V mutation not V561D mutation, >100-fold more selective for PDGFR than c-Kit, VEGFR-2, TIE-2, FGFR-2, EGFR, erbB2, and Src.
PF-5274857 is a potent and selective Smoothened (Smo) antagonist, inhibits Hedgehog (Hh) signaling with IC50 and Ki of 5.8 nM and 4.6 nM, respectively, and can penetrate the blood–brain barrier.
Sirtinol is a specific SIRT1 and SIRT2 inhibitor with IC50 of 131 μM and 38 μM, respectively.
ML133 is a selective potassium channel inhibitor for Kir2.1 with IC50 of 1.8 μM (pH 7.4) and 290 nM (pH 8.5), has no effect on Kir1.1 and weak activity for Kir4.1 and Kir7.1.
IMD-0354 is an IKKβ inhibitor and blocks IκBα phosphorylation in NF-κB pathway.
Apigenin is a potent P450 inhibitor for CYP2C9 with IC50 of 23 pM.
Pancuronium dibromide is a competitive acetylcholine antagonist with an IC50 of 5.5 ± 0.5 nM.
GW3965 is a potent, selective LXRagonist for hLXRα and hLXRβ with EC50 of 190 and 30 nM, respectively.
ICG-001 antagonizes Wnt/β-catenin/TCF-mediated transcription and specifically binds to element-binding protein (CBP) with IC50 of 3 μM, but is not the related transcriptional coactivator p300.
A-769662 is a potent, reversible AMPK activator with EC50of 0.8 μM, little effect on GPPase/FBPase activity.
AZ3146 is a selective Mps1 inhibitor with IC50 of ~35 nM, contributes to recruitment of CENP-E (kinesin-related motor protein), less potent to FAK, JNK1, JNK2, and Kit.
GW4064 is an agonist of farnesoid X receptor (FXR) with EC50 of 65 nM.
Dabrafenib (GSK2118436) is a mutant BRAFV600 specific inhibitor with IC50 of 0.8 nM, with 4- and 6-fold less potency against B-Raf(wt) and c-Raf, respectively. Phase 3.
JNJ-1661010 is a potent and selective FAAH inhibitor with IC50 of 10 nM (rat) and 12 nM (human), exhibits >100-fold selectivity for FAAH-1 when compared to FAAH-2.
U-104 is a potent carbonic anhydrase (CA) inhibitor for CA IX and CA XII with Ki of 45.1 nM and 4.5 nM, respectively, very low inhibition for CA I and CA II.
Bergenin is trihydroxybenzoic acid glycoside and the C-glycoside of 4-O-methyl gallic acid.
Trospium chloride (Sanctura) is a competitive muscarinic cholinergic receptor antagonist.
URB597 is a potent, orally bioavailable FAAH inhibitor with IC50 of 4.6 nM, with no activity on other cannabinoid-related targets.
PF-3845 is a potent, selective and irreversible FAAH inhibitor with Ki of 230 nM, showing negligible activity against FAAH2.
KX2-391 (KX01), the first clinical Src inhibitor (peptidomimetic class) that targets the peptide substrate site of Src, with GI50 of 9-60 nM in cancer cell lines. Phase 1/2.
PAC-1 is a potent procaspase-3 activator with EC50 of 0.22 μM and the first small molecule known to directly activate procaspase-3 to caspase-3.
Tofacitinib is a novel inhibitor of JAK3 with IC50 of 1 nM, 20- to 100-fold less potent against JAK2 and JAK1.
GDC-0068 is a highly selective pan-Akt inhibitor targeting Akt1/2/3 with IC50 of 5 nM/18 nM/8 nM, 620-fold selectivity over PKA. Phase 2.

SAR131675 is a VEGFR3 inhibitor with IC50/Ki of 23 nM/12 nM in cell-free assays, about 50- and 10-fold more selective for VEGFR3 than VEGFR1/2, little activity against Akt1, CDKs, PLK1, EGFR, IGF-1R, c-Met, Flt2 etc.
T0070907 is a potent and selective PPARγ inhibitor with IC50 of 1 nM, with a >800-fold selectivity over PPARα and PPARδ.
Cryptotanshinone (CPT) is a STAT3 inhibitor with IC50 of 4.6 μM, strongly inhibits phosphorylation of STAT3 Tyr705, with a small effect on STAT3 Ser727, but none against STAT1 nor STAT5.
Tolvaptan is a selective, competitive arginine vasopressin receptor 2 antagonist with an IC50 of 1.28μM for the inhibition of AVP-induced platelet aggregation.
BMS-378806 selectively inhibits the binding of HIV-1 gp120 to the CD4 receptor with EC50 of 0.85-26.5 nM in virus.
AS-252424 is a novel, potent PI3Kγ inhibitor with IC50 of 30 nM with 30-fold selectivity for PI3Kγ than PI3Kα, and low inhibitory activity towards PI3Kδ/β.
YO-01027 (Dibenzazepine, DBZ) is a dipeptidic γ-secretase inhibitor with IC50 of 2.6 nM and 2.9 nM for APPL and Notch cleavage, respectively.

Anacetrapib (MK0859) is a potent, selective, reversible rhCETP and mutant CETP(C13S) inhibitor with IC50 of 7.9 nM and 11.8 nM, increases HDL-C and decreases LDL-C, does not increase aldosterone or blood pressure. Phase 3.
Istradefylline is a selective adenosine A2A receptor (A2AR) antagonist with Ki of 2.2 nM.
AT101, the R-(-) enantiomer of Gossypol acetic acid, binds with Bcl-2, Bcl-xL and Mcl-1 with Ki of 0.32 μM, 0.48 μM and 0.18 μM; does not inhibit BIR3 domain and BID. Phase 1/2.

BI-D1870 is an ATP-competitive inhibitor of S6 ribosome for RSK1/2/3/4 with IC50 of 31 nM/24 nM/18 nM/15 nM, respectively; 10- to 100-fold selectivity for RSK than MST2, GSK-3β, MARK3, CK1 and Aurora B.
(+)-MK-801 is a potent, selective and non-competitive NMDA receptor antagonist with Kd of 37.2 nM in rat brain membranes
(-)-Parthenolide is a sesquiterpene lactone which occurs naturally in the plant feverfew(Tanacetum parthenium) and also promotes the ubiquitination of MDM2 and activates p53 cellular functions.
Gliclazide (Diamicron) is a whole-cell beta-cell ATP-sensitive potassium currents blocker with an IC50 of 184 ± 30 nM.
NPS 2143 is a novel potent and selective antagonist of Ca(2+) receptor with IC50 of 43 nM.
Ibrutinib is a potent and highly selective Btk inhibitor with IC50 of 0.5 nM, modestly potent to Bmx, CSK, FGR, BRK, HCK, less potent to EGFR, Yes, ErbB2, JAK3, etc.
LY411575 is a potent γ-secretase inhibitor with IC50 of 0.078 nM/0.082 nM (membrane/cell-based), also inhibits Notch clevage with withIC50 of 0.39 nM.

TH-302 is selective hypoxia-activated prodrug targeting hypoxic regions of solid tumors with IC50 of 19 nM, demonstrates 270-fold enhanced cytotoxicity under hypoxia versus their potency under aerobic conditions, stable to cytochrome P450 metabolism.
Sotrastaurin is a potent and selective pan-PKC inhibitor, mostly for PKCθ with Ki of 0.22 nM; inactive to PKCζ. Phase 1/2.
Tyrphostin AG 879 potently inhibits HER2/ErbB2 with IC50 of 1 μM, 100- and 500-fold higher selective to ErbB2 than PDGFR and EGFR.
BML-190 is a selective cannabinoid CB2 receptor inverse agonist with Ki of 435 nM, with 50-fold selectivity over CB1 receptor.
IKK 16 is a selective IκB kinase (IKK) inhibitor for IKK-2, IKK complex and IKK-1 with IC50 of 40 nM, 70 nM and 200 nM, respectively.
Rotundine (L-tetrahydropalmatine, L-THP) is a selective dopamine D1 receptor antagonist with IC50 of 166 nM.
Tioxolone is a metalloenzyme carbonic anhydrase I inhibitor with a Ki of 91 nM.

DCC-2036 is a conformational control Bcr-Abl inhibitor for Abl1(WT) and Abl1(T315I) with IC50 of 0.8 nM and 4 nM, also inhibits SRC, LYN, FGR, HCK, KDR, FLT3, and Tie-2, and low activity to seen towards c-Kit. Phase 1/2.
CHIR-124 is a novel and potent Chk1 inhibitor with IC50 of 0.3 nM. It shows 2,000-fold selectivity against Chk2, 500- to 5,000-fold less activity against CDK2/4 and Cdc2.
CP-91149 is a selective glycogen phosphorylase (GP) inhibitor with IC50 of 0.13 μM in the presence of glucose, 5- to 10-fold less potent in the absence of glucose.
Canagliflozin is a highly potent and selective SGLT2 inhibitor for hSGLT2 with IC50 of 2.2 nM, exhibits 413-fold selectivity over hSGLT1.
Torcetrapib is a CETP inhibitor with IC50 of 37 nM, elevates HDL-C and reduces nonHDL-C in plasma. Phase 3.
NVP-TAE226 is a potent FAK inhibitor with IC50 of 5.5 nM and modestly potent to Pyk2, ~10- to 100-fold less potent against InsR, IGF-1R, ALK, and c-Met.
MRS2578 is a potent P2Y6 receptor antagonist with IC50 of 37 nM, exhibits insignificant activity at P2Y1, P2Y2, P2Y4,and P2Y11 receptors.

PF-562271 is a potent, ATP-competitive, reversible inhibitor of FAK with IC50 of 1.5 nM, ~10-fold less potent for Pyk2 than FAK and >100-fold selectivity against other protein kinases, except for some CDKs.
Bupivacaine hydrochloride(Marcain) is a more potent cAMP production inhibitor with an IC50 of 2.3 μM
Fostamatinib (R788), a prodrug of the active metabolite R406, is a Syk inhibitor with IC50 of 41 nM, strongly inhibits Syk but not Lyn, 5-fold less potent to Flt3. Phase 2.
CCT128930 is a potent, ATP-competitive and selective inhibitor of Akt2 with IC50 of 6 nM, 28-fold greater selectivity for Akt2 than the closely related PKA kinase.
PF-2545920 is a potent and selective PDE10A inhibitor with IC50 of 0.37 nM, with >1000-fold selectivity over the PDE.
Nilvadipine is a potent calcium channel blocker with an IC50 of 0.03 nM.
Dalcetrapib (JTT-705) is a rhCETP inhibitor with IC50 of 0.2 μM that increases the plasma HDL cholesterol. Phase 3.
VU0357121 is a novel positive allosteric modulator (PAM) of mGlu5 with EC50 of 33 nM, is inactive or very weakly antagonizing at other mGlu receptor subtypes.
OC000459 is a potent and selective D prostanoid receptor 2 (DP2) antagonist with IC50 of 13 nM.
VU 0364770 is a positive allosteric modulator(PAM) of mGlu4 with EC50 of 1.1 μM, exhibits insignificant activity at 68 other receptors, including other mGlu subtypes.
GW441756 is a potent, selective inhibitor of TrkA with IC50 of 2 nM, with very little activity to c-Raf1 and CDK2.
SB742457 is a highly selective 5-HT6 receptor antagonist with pKi of 9.63, exhibits >100-fold selectivity over other receptors. Phase 2.
HC-030031 is a selective TRPA1 channel blocker that antagonizes AITC- and formalin-evoked calcium influx with IC50 of 6.2 μM and 5.3 μM respectively.
Vildagliptin (LAF-237) inhibits DPP−4 with IC50 of 2.3 nM.
Sertraline HCl is a 5-HT antagonist with Ki of 13 nM.
EUK 134, a synthetic superoxide dismutase (SOD)/catalase mimetic, exhibits potent antioxidant activities, and inhibits the formation of β-amyloid and related amyloid fibril.
Etoricoxib is a new COX-2 selective inhibitor with anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, analgesic, and potential antineoplastic properties.
SN-38 is an active metabolite of CPT-11, inhibits DNA topoisomerase I, DNA synthesis and causes frequent DNA single-strand breaks.
Birinapant is a SMAC mimetic antagonist, mostly to cIAP1 with Kd of <1 nM, less potent to XIAP. Phase 1/2.

Epoxomicin is a selective proteasome inhibitor with anti-inflammatory activity, inhibits primarily the CH-L activity of the 20S proteasome, while T-L and PGPH catalytic activities are also inhibited at 100- and 1000-fold reduced rate.
LDK378 is potent inhibitor against ALK with IC50 of 0.2 nM, shows 40- and 35-fold selectivity against IGF-1R and InsR, respectively. Phase 2.
ZM 306416 is a VEGFR (Flt and KDR) inhibitor for VEGFR1 with IC50 of 0.33 μM, but also found to inhibit EGFR with IC50 of <10 nM.
Icotinib is a potent and specific EGFR inhibitor with IC50 of 5 nM, including the EGFR, EGFR(L858R), EGFR(L861Q), EGFR(T790M) and EGFR(T790M, L858R). Phase 4.
Sitaxentan sodium is a selective endothelin A receptor (ETA) antagonist with IC50 and Ki of 1.4 nM and 0.43 nM, respectively, exhibits 7000-fold selectivity over ETB. Phase 3.
Sodium 4-Aminosalicylate is an antibiotic used to treat tuberculosis via NF-κB inhibition and free radical scavenging.
Ospemifene is a non-hormonal selective estrogen receptor modulator (SERM), used for the treatment of dyspareunia.
Parecoxib is a selective COX2 inhibitor.
MNS is a tyrosine kinases inhibitor, inhibits Syk, Src, p97 with IC50 of 2.5 μM, 29.3 μM and 1.7 μM, respectively.
VS-5584 (SB2343) is a potent and selective dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor for mTOR, PI3Kα/β/δ/γ with IC50 of 3.4 nM and 2.6-21 nM, respectively. Phase 1.
AZ20 is a novel potent and selective inhibitor of ATR kinase with IC50 of 5 nM, 8-fold selectivity over mTOR.
SANT-1 directly binds to Smoothened (Smo) receptor with Kd of 1.2 nM and inhibits Smo agonist effects with IC50 of 20 nM.
GNF-2 is a highly selective non-ATP competitive inhibitor of Bcr-Abl, shows no activity to Flt3-ITD, Tel-PDGFR, TPR-MET and Tel-JAK1 transformed tumor cells.

Apoptosis Activator 2 strongly induces caspase-3 activation, PARP cleavage, and DNA fragmentation which leads to the destruction of cells (Apaf-1 dependent) with IC50 of ~4 μM, inactive to HMEC, PREC, or MCF-10A cells.
Bosentan is an endothelin (ET) receptors antagonist for ET-A and ET-B with Ki of 4.7 nM and 95 nM, respectively.
Propranolol HCl is a competitive non-selective beta-adrenergic receptors inhibitor with IC50 of 12 nM.
MetoclopraMide HCl is a selective dopamine D2 receptor antagonist, used for the treatment of nausea and vomiting.
Tiagabine Hydrochloride is the hydrochloride salt form of tiagabine, a nipecotic acid derivative with anticonvulsant property. A selective gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) reuptake inhibitor.

(R)-Nepicastat HCl, the R-enantiomer of Nepicastat HCl, is a potent and selective inhibitor with IC50 of 25.1 nM and 18.3 nM for bovine and human dopamine-β-hydroxylase, with negligible affinity for twelve other enzymes and thirteen neurotransmitter receptors.
Stattic, the first nonpeptidic small molecule, potently inhibits STAT3 activation and nuclear translocation with IC50 of 5.1 μM, highly selectivity over STAT1.
CGI1746 is a potent and highly selective small-molecule inhibitor of the Btk with IC50 of 1.9 nM.
IPA-3 is a selective non-ATP competitive Pak1 inhibitor with IC50 of 2.5 μM, no inhibition to group II PAKs (PAKs 4-6).

Ki16198 is the methyl ester of Ki16425, which is a LPA antagonist and inhibits LPA1- and LPA3-induced inositol phosphate production with Ki of 0.34 μM and 0.93 μM, respectively, shows weaker inhibition for LPA2, no activity at LPA4, LPA5, LPA6.
Pifithrin-μ is a specific p53 inhibitor by reducing its affinity to Bcl-xL and Bcl-2, and also inhibits HSP70 function and autophagy.
Entacapone inhibits catechol-O-methyltransferase(COMT) with IC50 of 151 nM.
Ticagrelor is the first reversibly binding oral P2Y12 receptor antagonist, also inhibits CYP2C9 and 4-hydroxylation with IC50 of 10.5 μM and 8.2 μM respectively.

Mebendazole is a synthetic benzimidazole derivate and anthelmintic agent. Mebendazole interferes with the reproduction and survival of helminths by inhibiting the formation of their cytoplasmic microtubules, thereby selectively and irreversibly blocking glucose uptake.
Tiagabine is an anti-convulsive medication and a selective gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) reuptake inhibitor.
Fingolimod (FTY720) is a S1P antagonist with IC50 of 0.033 nM.
Embelin, a quinone isolated from the Japanese Ardisia herb, is an inhibitor of X-linked inhibitor of apoptosis (XIAP) with IC50 of 4.1 μM.
Tepotinib (EMD 1214063) is a potent and selective c-Met inhibitor with IC50 of 4 nM, >200-fold selective for c-Met than IRAK4, TrkA, Axl, IRAK1, and Mer. Phase 1.
NVP-HSP990 (HSP990) is a novel, potent and selective HSP90 inhibitor for HSP90α/β with IC50 of 0.6 nM/0.8 nM.
Go 6983 is a pan-PKC inhibitor against for PKCα, PKCβ, PKCγ and PKCδ with IC50 of 7 nM, 7 nM, 6 nM and 10 nM, respectively; less potent to PKCζ and inactive to PKCμ.
Rivaroxaban is a direct inhibitor of Factor Xa with Ki and IC50 of 0.4 nM and  0.7 nM, respectively.
Gliquidone is an ATP-sensitive K+ channel antagonist with IC50 of 27.2 nM.
Triamterene blocks epithelial Na+ channel (ENaC) in a voltage-dependent manner with IC50 of 4.5 μM.
Fenoldopam is a selective dopamine-1 receptor (DA1) agonist with natriuretic/diuretic properties. It lowers blood pressure through arteriolar vasodilation.

Terazosin is a selective alpha-1 antagonist used for treatment of symptoms of an enlarged prostate (BPH). It works by blocking the action of adrenaline on smooth muscle of the bladder and the blood vessel walls.

PTC124 (Ataluren) selectively induces ribosomal read-through of premature but not normal termination codons, with EC50 of 0.1 μM, may provide treatment for genetic disorders caused by nonsense mutations (e.g. CF caused by CFTR nonsense mutation). Phase 3.
AZD2461 is a novel PARP inhibitor with low affinity for Pgp than Olaparib. Phase 1.

GSK J4 HCl is a cell permeable prodrug of GSK J1, which is the first selective inhibitor of the H3K27 histone demethylase JMJD3 and UTX with IC50 of 60 nM and inactive against a panel of demethylases of the JMJ family.
VE-822 is an ATR inhibitor with IC50 of 19 nM.
WZ811 is a highly potent competitive CXCR4 antagonist with EC50 of 0.3 nM.
Rimonabant is a selective antagonist of CB1 with IC50 of 13.6 nM and EC50 of 17.3 nM in hCB1 transfected HEK 293 membrane.
Brinzolamide is a potent carbonic anhydrase II inhibitor with IC50 of 3.19 nM.
Ifenprodil is an atypical noncompetitive antagonist at the NMDA receptor, it interacts with high affinity at a homogeneous population of NMDA receptors in neonatal rat forebrain with IC50 of 0.3 μM.
Chlorotrianisene is a synthetic, non-steroidal estrogen. It is a selective estrogen receptor modulator.
Saxagliptin H2O is a selective and reversible DPP4 inhibitor with IC50 of 26 nM.
AP26113 is a potent ALK inhibitor with IC50 of 0.62 nM, demonstrated ability overcome Crizotinib resistance mediated by a L1196M mutation. Phase 1/2.
RG7112 (RO5045337) is an orally bioavailable and selective p53-MDM2 inhibitor. Phase 1.
T0901317 is a potent and selective agonist for both LXR and FXR, with EC50 of ~50 nM and 5 μM, respectively.
AZD3463 is a novel orally bioavailable ALK inhibitor with Ki of 0.75 nM, which also inhibits IGF1R with equivalent potency.
GW9662 is a selective PPAR antagonist for PPARγ with IC50 of 3.3 nM, with at least 100 to 1000-fold functional selectivity in cells with PPARγversus PPARα and PPARδ.
Piceatannol, a natural stilbene, is a selective Syk inhibitor and ~10-fold selectivity versus Lyn.
Moclobemide is MAO-A (5-HT) inhibitor with IC50 of 6.1 μM.
Tranylcypromine is a monoamine oxidase inhibitor, which inhibits CYP2A6 with Ki of 0.08 μM and 0.2 μM in cDNA-expressing microsomes and Human Liver Microsomes, respectively.
Cyproheptadine hydrochloride is non-selective 5HT2 antagonist with IC50 of 0.6 nM. Also a SETD7/9 inhibitor.
Tenovin-6 is a small molecule activator of p53 transcriptional activity.
PP2 is Src family kinase inhibitor, potently inhibits Lck/Fyn with IC50 of 4 nM/5 nM, ~100-fold less potent to EGFR, inactive for ZAP-70, JAK2 and PKA.
GSK2656157 is an ATP-competitive and highly selective inhibitor of PERK with IC50 of 0.9 nM, 500-fold greater against a panel of 300 kinases.
SGC 0946 is a highly potent and selective DOT1L methyltransferase inhibitor with IC50 of 0.3 nM, is inactive against a panel of 12 PMTs and DNMT1.
NLG919 is a potent IDO (indoleamine-(2,3)-dioxygenase) pathway inhibitor with Ki/EC50 of 7 nM/75 nM.
ML-161 is an allosteric inhibitor of PAR1 with IC50 of 0.26 μM.
Linagliptin is a highly potent, selective DPP-4 inhibitor with IC50 of 1 nM.
Mirabegron is a selective β3-adrenoceptor agonist with EC50 of 22.4 nM.
Vilazodone HCl is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) and  a partial agonist of 5-HT1A receptors, used for the treatment of major depressive disorder.
Lesinurad is a selective uric acid reabsorption inhibitor (SURI) under investigation for treatment of gout in combination with xanthine oxidase inhibitors.

SC-514 is an orally active, ATP-competitive IKK-2 inhibitor with IC50 of 3-12 μM, blocks NF-κB-dependent gene expression, does not inhibit other IKK isoforms or other serine-threonine and tyrosine kinases.
GDC-0152 is a potent antagonist of XIAP-BIR3, ML-IAP-BIR3, cIAP1-BIR3 and cIAP2-BIR3 with Ki of 28 nM, 14 nM, 17 nM and 43 nM, respectively; less affinity shown to cIAP1-BIR2 and cIAP2-BIR2. Phase 1.
Wnt-C59 (C59) is a PORCN inhibitor for Wnt3A-mediated activation of a multimerized TCF-binding site driving luciferase with IC50 of 74 pM.
RN486 is a potent and selective BTK inhibitor with IC50 of 4 nM.
Zebularine is a DNA methylation inhibitor that forms a covalent complex with DNA methyltransferases, also inhibits cytidinedeaminase with Ki of 2 μM.
AMG 517 is a potent and selective TRPV1 antagonist, antagonizes capsaicin, proton, and heat activation of TRPV1 with IC50 of 0.76 nM, 0.62 nM and 1.3 nM.
TCID is a DUB inhibitor for ubiquitin C-terminal hydrolase L3 with IC50 of 0.6 μM, 125-fold selective to L1.
Motolimod (VTX-2337) is a selective and potent Toll-like receptor (TLR) 8 agonist with EC50 of 100 nM, > 50-fold selectivity over TLR7. Phase 2.
RKI-1447 is a potent inhibitor of ROCK1 and ROCK2, with IC50 of 14.5 nM and 6.2 nM, respectively, has anti-invasive and antitumor activities.
NVP-TNKS656 is a highly potent, selective, and orally active tankyrase inhibitor with IC50 of 6 nM for TNKS2, > 300-fold selectivity against PARP1 and PARP2.
CNX-774 is an irreversible, orally active, and highly selective BTK inhibitor with IC50 of <1 nM.
NMS-873 is an allosteric and specific p97 inhibitor with IC50 of 30 nM.
HTH-01-015 is a potent and selective NUAK1 inhibitor with IC50 of 100 nM, >100-fold selectivity over NUAK2.
JSH-23 is an inhibitor of NF-κB transcriptional activity with IC50 of 7.1 μM.
PTC-209 is a potent and selective BMI-1 inhibitor with IC50 of 0.5 μM, and results in irreversible reduction of cancer-initiating cells (CICs).
MLN2480 is an oral, selective pan-Raf kinase inhibitor in chinical trials.
NSC697923 is a cell-permeable and selective inhibitor of the Ub-conjugating enzyme (E2) complex Ubc13-Uev1A.
Mdivi-1 is a selective cell-permeable inhibitor of mitochondrial division DRP1 (dynamin-related GTPase) and mitochondrial division Dynamin I (Dnm1) with IC50 of 1-10 μM.
DBeQ is a selective, potent, reversible, and ATP-competitive p97 inhibitor with IC50 of 1.5 μM.
AGI-6780 is a potent and selective inhibitor of IDH2 R140Q mutant with IC50 of 23 nM.
AZD1981 is a potent, selective CRTh2 (DP2) receptor antagonist with IC50 of 4 nM, showing >1000-fold selectivity over more than 340 other enzymes and receptors, including DP1.
PFK15 is a potent and selective 6-phosphofructo-2-kinase (PFKFB3) with IC50 of 207 nM.
EHop-016 is a specific Rac GTPase inhibitor with IC50 of 1.1 μM for Rac1, equally potent inhibition for Rac3.
ARQ 621 is an allosteric, and selective Eg5 mitotic motor protein inhibitor. Phase 1.
UNC669 is a potent and selective MBT (malignant brain tumor) inhibitor with IC50 of 6 μM for L3MBTL1, 5- and 11-fold selective over L3MBTL3 and L3MBTL4.
SC144 is an orally active small-molecule gp130 inhibitor.
DMH1 is a selective BMP receptor inhibitor with IC50 of 107.9 nM for ALK2, exhibiting no inhibition on AMPK, ALK5, KDR (VEGFR-2) or PDGFR.
SSR128129E is an orally-active and allosteric FGFR1 inhibitor with IC50 of 1.9 μM, while not affecting other related RTKs.
Idasanutlin (RG-7388) is a potent and selective p53-MDM2 inhibitor with IC50 of 6 nM.
Erastin is a ferroptosis activator by acting on mitochondrial VDAC, exhibiting selectivity for tumor cells bearing oncogenic RAS.
MM-102 is a high-affinity peptidomimetic MLL1 inhibitor with IC50 of 0.4 μM.
ZCL278 is a selective Cdc42 GTPase inhibitor with Kd of 11.4 μM.
TMP269 is a potent, selective class IIa HDAC inhibitor with IC50 of 157 nM, 97 nM, 43 nM and 23 nM for HDAC4, HDAC5, HDAC7 and HDAC9, respectively.
OTX015 is a potent BET bromodomain inhibitor with EC50 ranging from 10 to 19 nM for BRD2, BRD3, and BRD4. Phase 1.
E-64 is an irreversible and selective cysteine protease inhibitor with IC50 of 9 nM for papain.
KPT-185 is a selective CRM1 inhibitor.
LDN-212854 is a potent and selective BMP receptor inhibitor with IC50 of 1.3 nM for ALK2, about 2-, 66-, 1641-, and 7135-fold selectivity over ALK1, ALK3, ALK4, and ALK5, respectively.
AVL-292 is a covalent, orally active, and highly selective BTK inhibitor with IC50 of <0.5 nM, displaying at least 1400-fold selectivity over the other kinases assayed. Phase 1.
CNX-2006 is a novel irreversible mutant-selective EGFR inhibitor with IC50 of < 20 nM, with very weak inhibition at wild-type EGFR.
Ferrostatin-1 (Fer-1) is a potent and selective inhibitor of ferroptosis with EC50 of 60 nM.
Golgicide A is a potent and rapidly reversible GBF1 inhibitor.
ML324 is a selective inhibitor of jumonji histone demethylase (JMJD2) with IC50 of 920 nM.
6H05 is a selective, and allosteric inhibitor of oncogenic K-Ras(G12C).
Atglistatin is a highly potent, and selective inhibitor of adipose triglyceride lipase (ATGL) with IC50 of 0.7 μM, high selectivity over other key metabolic lipases.
Loxistatin Acid (E-64C), a derivative of E-64, is an irreversible and membrane-permeant cysteine protease inhibitor.
PYR-41 is the first cell-permeable inhibitor of ubiquitin-activating enzyme E1, with no activity at E2.
ML347 is a selective BMP receptor inhibitor with IC50 of 32 nM for ALK2, >300-fold selectivity over ALK3. Also inhibits ALK1 activity with IC50 of 46 nM.
ABC294640 is an orally bioavailable and selective sphingosine kinase-2 (SphK2) inhibitor with IC50 of approximately 60 μM. Phase 1/2.
Losmapimod (GW856553X) is a selective, potent, and orally active p38 MAPK inhibitor with pKi of 8.1 and 7.6 for p38α and p38β, respectively. Phase 3.
RO3280 is a potent, highly selective inhibitor of  Polo-like kinase 1 (PLK1) with IC50 of 3 nM.
SRPIN340 is a selective SRPK inhibitor with Ki of 0.89 μM for SRPK1, showing no significant inhibitory activity against more than 140 other kinases..
AZD9291 is an oral, irreversible, and mutant-selective EGFR inhibitor with IC50 of 12.92, 11.44 and 493.8 nM for Exon 19 deletion EGFR, L858R/T790M EGFR, and WT EGFR, respectively. Phase 3.
ERK5-IN-1 is a potent, and selective ERK5 inhibitor with IC50 of 162 nM.
GNE-0877 is a highly potent and selective leucine-rich repeat kinase 2 (LRRK2) inhibitor with Ki of 0.7 nM.
Aloxistatin is an irreversible and membrane-permeable cysteine protease inhibitor.
PR-619 is a non-selective, reversible inhibitor of the deubiquitinylating enzymes (DUBs) with EC50 of 1-20 μM.
NSC319726 is a p53(R175) mutant reactivator, exhibits growth inhibition in cells expressing mutant p53, with IC50 of 8 nM for p53(R175) mutant, shows no inhibition for p53 wild-type cells.
SKI II is a highly selective and non ATP-competitive S1P receptor inhibitor with IC50 of 0.5 μM, while exhibits no inhibitory on other kinases including PI3K, PKCα and ERK2.

Alvelestat (AZD9668) is an oral, highly selective inhibitor of neutrophil elastase (NE) with IC50 and Ki of 12 nM and 9.4 nM, at least 600-fold more selective over other serine proteases.
 Phase 2.
KPT-276 is an orally bioavailable selective CRM1 inhibitor.
4μ8C is a potent and selective IRE1 Rnase inhibitor with IC50 of 76 nM.
GSK2606414 is an orally available, potent, and selective PERK inhibitor with IC50 of 0.4 nM, displaying at least 100-fold selectivity over the other EIF2AKs assayed.
CW069 is an allosteric, and selective inhibitor of microtubule motor protein HSET with IC50 of 75 μM, significant selectivity over KSP.
GNE-9605 is a highly potent and selective leucine-rich repeat kinase 2 (LRRK2) inhibitor with Ki and IC50 of 2 nM and 19 nM, respectively.
FLI-06 is a novel inhibitor of Notch signaling with EC50 of 2.3 μM.
P22077 is an inhibitor of ubiquitin-specific protease USP7 with EC50 of 8.6 μM, also inhibits the closely related USP47.
C646 is an inhibitor for histone acetyltransferase, and inhibits p300 with a Ki of 400 nM.  Preferentially selective for p300 versus other acetyltransferases.
AGI-5198 is the first highly potent and selective inhibitor of IDH1 R132H/R132C mutants with IC50 of 0.07 μM/0.16 μM.
RepSox is a potent and selective inhibitor of the TGFβR-1/ALK5 with IC50 of 23 nM and 4 nM for ATP binding to ALK5 and ALK5 autophosphorylation, respectively.
KPT-330 is an orally bioavailable selective CRM1 inhibitor.
SGI-1027 is a DNMT inhibitor with IC50 of 6, 8, 7.5 μM for DNMT1, DNMT3A, and DNMT3B
STF-118804 is a highly specific NAMPT inhibitor.
AZ191 is a potent and selective DYRK1B inhibitor with IC50 of 17 nM in a cell-free assay, about 5- and 110-fold selectivity over DYRK1A and DYRK2, respectively.
4EGI-1 is a competitive eIF4E/eIF4G interaction inhibitor by binding to eIF4E with KD of 25 μM.
Caffeic acid phenethyl ester is a potent and specific inhibitor of NF-κB activation, and also displays antioxidant, immunomodulatory and antiinflammatory activities.
CGK 733 is a potent and selective inhibitor of ATM/ATR with IC50 of ~200 nM.
Batimastat (BB-94) is a potent, broad spectrum matrix metalloprotease (MMP) inhibitor for MMP-1, MMP-2, MMP-9, MMP-7 and MMP-3 with IC50 of 3 nM, 4 nM, 4 nM, 6 nM and 20 nM, respectively.
PF-04620110 is an orally active, selective and potent diglyceride acyltransferase-1 (DGAT1) inhibitor with IC50 of 19 nM.
OG-L002 is a potent and specific LSD1 inhibitor with IC50 of 20 nM, exhibiting 36- and 69-fold selectivity over MAO-B and MAO-A, respectively.
NMS-P937 (NMS1286937) is an orally available, selective Polo-like Kinase 1 (PLK1) inhibitor with IC50 of 2 nM, 5000-fold selectivity over PLK2/PLK3. Phase 1.

JIB-04 is a pan-selective Jumonji histone demethylase inhibitor with IC50 of 230, 340, 855, 445, 435, 1100, and 290 nM for JARID1A, JMJD2E, JMJD3, JMJD2A, JMJD2B, JMJD2C, and JMJD2D in cell-free assays, respectively.
WZ4003 is a highly specific NUAK kinase inhibitor with IC50 of 20 nM and 100 nM for NUAK1 and NUAK2, respectively, without significant inhibition on 139 other kinases.
